title: Iran Vows to Protect Its Nuclear and Missile Capabilities as Oil Prices Soar to Four-Year High
summary: Tehran and Washington remain at an impasse in negotiations, with arguments over nuclear matters and the Strait of Hormuz raging on.
contents:
## Article

**Source**: Yahoo News - World (via Time)
**Published**: 2026-04-30T20:44:19.000Z
**URL**: https://www.yahoo.com/news/articles/iran-vows-protect-nuclear-missile-185941114.html

### Headline

Iran Vows to Protect Its Nuclear and Missile Capabilities as Oil Prices Soar to Four-Year High

### Reported Details

Tehran and Washington remain at an impasse in negotiations, with arguments over nuclear matters and the Strait of Hormuz raging on.

## Reporting Context

Yahoo News aggregates international wire-service dispatches with editorial filtering. Cross-referencing with original wire reports (Reuters, AP, AFP) supports verification. This entry reflects an article surfaced and timestamped within the OSINT collection window. Independent confirmation through additional outlets remains advisable for high-impact claims.
